quiz_result_subtitle: Here is your diagnosis summary based on your answers. This analysis is prepared by our system based on Johns Hopkins protocols.
quiz_urgency_text: Every day of delay = worsening of the real cause. Early treatment doubles the chances of recovery.
quiz_risks_footer: Without treatment targeting the real cause, the problem gradually worsens — and chemical pills don't treat the cause, they only hide it temporarily.
quiz_rec_intro: Based on your diagnosis, we recommend the {package} Program. This program uses a two-phase treatment principle — developed from Johns Hopkins protocols:
quiz_rec_ingredients_note: Every formula is prepared specifically after your consultation with Dr. Sarah — no ready-made products. Ingredients are 100% natural, certified by FDA, GMP, and SGS, and 100% Halal.
quiz_messenger_cta: 💬 Contact Dr. Sarah on Messenger — Detailed Treatment Plan
quiz_result_desc:
Dr. Sarah will discuss this diagnosis with you in detail, answer your questions, and then prepare your custom formula and the right dosage for your body.
The consultation is completely free — treatment begins after an accurate diagnosis.
quiz_privacy_note: 🔒 All your information remains completely confidential — we do not store it on our server
quiz_step_condition_question: What problem is affecting your sexual life right now?
quiz_step_condition_subtitle: You can choose more than one, but let's start with the most important.
quiz_step_condition_opt0: Premature Ejaculation — I finish too quickly
quiz_step_condition_opt1: Erectile Dysfunction — Erection doesn't complete or last
quiz_step_condition_opt2: Small Size — I feel my size is insufficient
quiz_step_condition_opt3: I suffer from all three problems together
quiz_step_age_subtitle: Age helps us understand your hormonal status better.
quiz_step_health_question: Do you suffer from any of the following health conditions?
quiz_step_health_subtitle: This is very important — because some diseases directly affect sexual performance.
quiz_step_health_opt4: I don't suffer from any of them
quiz_step_habits_subtitle: We know this question is personal — but it's essential to diagnose the real cause.
quiz_step_habits_opt1: Yes, a few times a week
quiz_step_lifestyle_question: How would you describe your current lifestyle?
quiz_step_lifestyle_subtitle: Choose what applies to you the most.
quiz_step_lifestyle_opt1: Lack of sleep or sleep disorders
quiz_step_goal_question: What is the most important goal for you?
quiz_step_goal_subtitle: We will focus our treatment on the priority you choose.
quiz_step_goal_opt4: All of the above — I want a comprehensive solution
quiz_step_symptom_pe_question: Excluding foreplay — how long does intercourse currently last?
quiz_step_symptom_pe_subtitle: The actual time from penetration to ejaculation.
quiz_step_symptom_ed_question: How would you describe your current erection condition?
quiz_step_symptom_ed_subtitle: Choose the description closest to your condition.
quiz_step_symptom_ed_opt4: Erection exists but not as I wish
quiz_step_symptom_size_question: What is your penis length when erect currently (approximately in inches)?
quiz_step_symptom_size_subtitle: This is completely confidential — this information will not be shared with anyone.
quiz_step_symptom_default_question: How long does intercourse currently last?
quiz_mechanism_pe_serotonin_low: Serotonin level is significantly low (5-HT < 150 ng/mL) — this hormone is responsible for controlling ejaculation
quiz_mechanism_pe_cc_weak: The corpus cavernosum is weak — cannot retain blood for a sufficient period
quiz_mechanism_pe_sensitivity: Excessive sensitivity in the glans due to weak vascular walls
quiz_mechanism_pe_tissue_damage: Damage to corpus cavernosum tissue from frequent masturbation — each time equals the pressure of 6 natural intercourses
quiz_mechanism_ed_blood_flow: Blood flow to genital organs is 40–60% lower than normal
quiz_mechanism_ed_no_low: Nitric oxide (NO) level is low — the substance responsible for dilating blood vessels
quiz_mechanism_ed_signal: Disruption in nerve signals between the brain and genital organs
quiz_mechanism_ed_diabetic: Chronic high blood sugar causes damage to peripheral nerves (Neuropathy) — affects sensation and control
quiz_mechanism_size_testosterone: Free testosterone level is low (< 300 ng/dL)
quiz_mechanism_size_dht: DHT (dihydrotestosterone) level is insufficient to stimulate tissue growth
quiz_mechanism_size_blood_flow: Weak blood flow prevents expansion of corpus cavernosum chambers
quiz_mechanism_diabetes: Chronic diabetes damages small nerves and blood vessels — reduces blood flow by 30–50%
quiz_mechanism_prostate: Prostate enlargement/inflammation compresses surrounding nerves and reduces seminal fluid flow
quiz_mechanism_pressure: Chronic high blood pressure narrows the genital artery and reduces blood flow
quiz_mechanism_depression: Depression and anxiety raise cortisol and lower testosterone and dopamine
quiz_mechanism_stress: Chronic stress raises cortisol — every 1 ng/mL increase in cortisol = 10% decrease in testosterone
quiz_mechanism_sleep: 90% of testosterone is produced during deep sleep (REM phase) — lack of sleep = sharp hormone decline
quiz_mechanism_sedentary: Lack of movement causes visceral fat accumulation — every 5-point increase in body fat = 50 ng/mL decrease in testosterone
quiz_mechanism_smoke: Nicotine narrows blood vessels by 25% and reduces oxygen reaching genital organs
quiz_mechanism_default: The body needs support with natural ingredients to stimulate production of essential hormones
quiz_cause_pe_serotonin: Serotonin deficiency in the central nervous system
quiz_cause_pe_sensitivity: Excessive nerve sensitivity + weak corpus cavernosum wall
quiz_cause_pe_tissue: Tissue damage in corpus cavernosum (CC damage)
quiz_cause_ed_vascular: Blood vessel narrowing + nitric oxide deficiency
quiz_cause_size_hormonal: Hormonal deficiency (testosterone + DHT) + weak blood flow
quiz_cause_diabetes: Diabetic nerve and blood vessel damage
quiz_cause_pressure: Vascular narrowing from high blood pressure
quiz_cause_depression: Hormonal psychological disorder (high cortisol + low testosterone)
quiz_cause_sleep: Lack of deep sleep prevents testosterone production
quiz_cause_sedentary: Lack of physical activity + visceral fat accumulation
quiz_cause_default: Deficiency in serotonin and testosterone levels — the most common causes
quiz_risk_pe_ed_progression: Without treatment: 85% of cases progress to erectile dysfunction within 12–24 months
quiz_risk_pe_marriage: The marital relationship deteriorates — 60% of women lose interest after 6 months of dissatisfaction
quiz_risk_ed_heart: Chronic erectile dysfunction increases risk of heart and cardiovascular diseases by 70%
quiz_risk_ed_dependency: Chemical pills (Viagra) don't treat the cause — they only temporarily hide the symptom and cause psychological dependence
quiz_risk_size_confidence: Chronic size concern is linked to 45% decrease in self-confidence and depression
quiz_risk_diabetes_worsen: Uncontrolled diabetes worsens the problem by 3–4 times
quiz_risk_prostate_complication: Neglected prostate diseases lead to chronic complications in the urinary and reproductive systems
quiz_treatment_basic_p1: Phase 1 (Days 1–10): Repair corpus cavernosum tissue — L-Arginine + Citrulline + Zinc
quiz_treatment_basic_p2: Phase 2 (Days 11–30): Activate serotonin and nerve control — Tongkat Ali + Korean Ginseng + Magnesium
quiz_treatment_comprehensive_p1: Phase 1 (Days 1–15): Repair tissues and vessels — VEGF + FGF + L-Arginine + Omega-3 + B12
quiz_treatment_comprehensive_p2: Phase 2 (Days 16–30): Hormonal activation and growth — DHT precursors + Tongkat Ali + Ginseng + Zinc + Magnesium
quiz_treatment_advanced_p1: Phase 1 (Days 1–12): Vascular and nerve repair — L-Arginine + Citrulline + B12
quiz_treatment_advanced_p2: Phase 2 (Days 13–30): Hormonal stimulation and performance improvement — Tongkat Ali + Ginseng + Zinc
